data.title: Chainlink (LINK) falls by 9%, now at $16.43, amid Fed's hawkish stance leading to a crypto selloff. RSI at 46. Fed signals prompt a risk-off sentiment in crypto.
data.description: The price of LINK has fallen to $16.43 due to bearish momentum, leading to a test of important support levels. Despite this, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral position of 46. The Federal Reserve's signaling of interest rates has caused a shift towards risk-off sentiment in the crypto markets.
The Financial Conduct Authority confirms that the restriction on retail access to cryptoasset derivatives will stay enforced.

data.title: Spectral Capital develops 100+ hybrid quantum-classical innovations in 2025, boosting AI model efficiency for acquired businesses.
data.description: A prominent technology company, Spectral Capital Corporation (OTC: FCCN), based in Seattle, disclosed on August 1, 2025, that it has created more than 100 advancements in hybrid computing solely in the year 2025. The company specializes in developing and acquiring state-of-the-art AI and quantum technologies. This achievement forms part of its extensive range of innovations in the technology sector.

data.title: AVAX price falls 8% to $21.95, testing key support amid ETF buzz and $250M RWA push.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently priced at $21.95, representing an 8% decrease. This decline has led to the testing of crucial support levels, despite previous positive momentum due to anticipation surrounding ETFs and a $250 million initiative focused on reducing risk-weighted assets.

data.title: PotisEdge maintains Tier 1 ranking by BNEF for energy storage fifth time in a row in Q3 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 1, 2025, Bloomberg New Energy Finance (BNEF) unveiled its latest report, the BNEF Energy Storage Tier 1 List for the third quarter of 2025. This list ranks companies within the energy storage sector based on various criteria. Notably, PotisEdge has maintained its position as a Tier 1 Energy Storage company on this prestigious list. BNEF is a widely respected research institution specializing in the new energy industry, and their recognition of PotisEdge underscores the company's continued success and leadership in the sector.

data.title: Digital Asset Treasury Companies (DATCOs) collectively hold over $100 billion in cryptocurrencies, with 791,662 BTC and 1.3 million ETH among them. The rise of DATCOs is influencing Bitcoin's market dynamics, with Strategy leading with over 600,000 BTC worth $71.8 billion. Bitcoin prices are being influenced by equity markets due to these companies using capital raised through equity programs to acquire more assets.
data.description: A new class of public companies known as Digital Asset Treasury Companies (DATCOs) are accumulating crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum as a core business strategy. Collectively, these DATCOs now hold over $100 billion in cryptocurrencies. Research by Galaxy Research shows that DATCOs hold around 791,662 BTC and over 1.3 million ETH, representing nearly 4% of Bitcoin's circulating supply and more than 1% of Ethereum's. The majority of these holdings are concentrated in a few firms, with Strategy leading with over 600,000 BTC worth $71.8 billion, accounting for over 70% of all Bitcoin held by public treasury companies. DATCOs are influencing crypto markets by using equity market dynamics to raise capital through mechanisms like At-the-Market (ATM) equity programs and Private Investments in Public Equity (PIPEs), strengthening their equity premium and attracting further inflows to acquire more digital assets. Companies like Strategy and Metaplanet have utilized this strategy successfully. This new financial structure signifies a shift where Bitcoin prices are increasingly influenced by these DATCOs in the equity market.
